name: Attack
note: Skill #1 corresponds to the Attack command.

name: Guard
note: Skill #2 corresponds to the Guard command.

description:
Below are spaces for when you would like to display
things above skills when you open the menu.
name: ---- Limits ----

description: Fires a quick arrow at one enemy.
name: Quick Shot

description: Marks a target, making it easier to bring down.
name: Beast Mark

description: Fire two guaranteed arrows at one enemy.
name: Twin Shot

description: A disabling shot that slows the enemy's movement.
name: Pinning Shot

description: Fires a barbed arrow that weakens the target's defense.
name: Thorn Shot

description: Fires a spread of arrows at all enemies.
name: Volley

description: Focuses the user's aim, raising accuracy and critical rate.
name: Eagle Eye

description: Fires a precise shot that pierces enemy defenses.
name: Piercing Shot

description: Prepares the user's next bow technique.
name: Hunter's Focus

description: Fires a flawless barrage that seeks enemy weak points.
name: Trueflight Barrage

description: Delivers a heavy axe blow to one enemy.
name: Power Strike

description: Draws enemy attention and raises the user's attack.
name: War Cry

description: Sweeps through all enemies with a broad axe swing.
name: Cleave

description: Crushes an enemy's guard and lowers defense.
name: Guard Breaker

description: Spins through the enemy line with a powerful axe sweep.
name: Sweeping Axe

description: Enters a battle frenzy, raising attack and TP gain.
name: Battle Trance

description: A brutal strike with high critical potential.
name: Skullsplitter

description: Slams the ground, damaging and possibly stunning all enemies.
name: Earthshatter

description: A devastating axe strike that tears through even the strongest foes.
name: Titan Rend

description: Restores a small amount of HP to one ally.
name: Cure

description: Deals light Holy damage to one enemy.
name: Dia

description: Cures poison from one ally.
name: Poisona

description: Raises one ally's physical defense.
name: Protect

description: Restores a moderate amount of HP to one ally.
name: Cura

description: Gradually restores one ally's HP over time.
name: Regen

description: Cures blindness from one ally.
name: Blindna

description: Deals moderate Holy damage to one enemy.
name: Diara

description: Raises one ally's magic defense.
name: Shell

description: Restores a small amount of HP to all allies.
name: Medica

description: Revives a fallen ally with low HP.
name: Raise

description: Removes several harmful conditions from one ally.
name: Esuna

description: Restores a large amount of HP to one ally.
name: Curaga

description: Raises physical defense for all allies.
name: Protectga

description: Raises magic defense for all allies.
name: Shellga

description: Deals heavy Holy damage to one enemy.
name: Diaga

description: Places a powerful healing effect on one ally.
name: Renew

description: Restores a moderate amount of HP to all allies.
name: Medira

description: Removes beneficial effects from one enemy.
name: Dispel

description: Fully revives a fallen ally.
name: Arise

description: Restores a massive amount of HP to one ally.
name: Curaja

description: Calls protective light over the party.
name: Sanctuary

description: Deals powerful Holy damage to all enemies.
name: Diaja

description: Restores heavy HP to all allies and cleanses minor ailments.
name: Mediga

description: Deals Fire damage to one enemy.
name: Fire

description: Deals Ice damage to one enemy.
name: Blizzard

description: Deals Thunder damage to one enemy.
name: Thunder

description: Deals light Fire damage to all enemies.
name: Flameburst

description: Deals light Ice damage to all enemies.
name: Frostfall

description: Deals light Thunder damage to all enemies.
name: Stormcall

description: Attempts to put all enemies to sleep.
name: Sleep

description: Deals moderate Fire damage to one enemy.
name: Fira

description: Deals moderate Ice damage to one enemy.
name: Blizzara

description: Deals moderate Thunder damage to one enemy.
name: Thundara

description: Drains HP from one enemy.
name: Drain

description: Poisons an enemy with corrupt magic.
name: Bio

description: Deals strong Fire damage to all enemies.
name: Inferno

description: Deals strong Ice damage to all enemies.
name: Glacier

description: Deals strong Thunder damage to all enemies.
name: Tempest

description: Deals non-elemental magic damage to one enemy.
name: Comet

description: Lowers one enemy's magic defense.
name: Expose

description: Deals heavy Fire damage to one enemy.
name: Firaga

description: Deals heavy Ice damage to one enemy.
name: Blizzaga

description: Deals heavy Thunder damage to one enemy.
name: Thundaga

description: Drains MP from one enemy.
name: Osmose

description: Deals devastating non-elemental damage to one enemy.
name: Flare

description: Calls meteors down on all enemies.
name: Meteor

description: Unleashes catastrophic magic against all enemies.
name: Cataclysm

description: Strike with a shield. May stun one enemy.
name: Shield Bash

description: Draw enemy attention and improve guarding.
name: Hold the Line

description: Strike the enemy's weapon arm and lower ATK.
name: Disarming Cut

description: Swear to defend allies from harm.
name: Guardian's Oath

description: Raise shields to reduce physical damage to all allies.
name: Shield Wall

description: Step in to protect wounded allies.
name: Interpose

description: Challenge one enemy with a commanding strike.
name: Royal Challenge

description: Protect the party from physical and magical damage.
name: King's Aegis

description: Become the party's final wall.
name: Last Bastion

message1: Roots burst from the ground as %1 crushes its prey!
name: Thornroot Crush

message1: %1 releases a choking cloud of briars and spores!
name: Briar Breath

message1: %1 dives and rakes the target with its talons!
name: Dive Rake

message1: %1 stomps the ground with brutish force!
name: Crownbreaker Stomp

message1: %1 bellows at the goblins to fight harder!
name: Warren Rally
